result:
The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been saved to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' with the following structure:

1. All input files were loaded from data/input/ using readr::read_delim() with tab delimiter
2. Datasets were merged using full_join() by the NSID variable
3. Missing values were recoded to standard codes (-9 for refusal, -8 for don't know, -1 for not applicable, -2 for script error, -3 for not asked)
4. Detailed adolescent housing tenure variables (hownteen14-20) were created with full granularity
5. Collapsed harmonized variables (hown14-20, hown25, hown32) were created with consistent categories
6. Appropriate labels were added to all variables using attr()
7. The final dataset includes only NSID and the derived variables (both detailed and collapsed)
8. The output was written to CSV format without row names

The cleaned dataset is now ready for analysis.
